content: Muzammil is an aspiring researcher and data science practitioner, he has been working in the data science and machine learning domain for over 2 years. His current research interests are Deep Learning based Computer Vision in general and Unsupervised and Self-Supervised representation learning for 2D and 3D predictions in particular. He currently works at the data science consultancy, LFD, which develops data-driven solutions for clients in various industries.
summary: Muzammil is an aspiring researcher and data science practitioner, he has been working in the data science and machine learning domain for over 2 years. His current research interests are Deep Learning based Computer Vision in general and Unsupervised and Self-Supervised representation learning for 2D and 3D predictions in particular.
title: M. Muzammil Aziz
Machine Learning (An Overview of Appications, Theory, and Research)

content: Among this year’s tutorials at CVPR, Interpretable Machine Learning and Computer Vision was one of my favorite ones. The tutorial was about 2 hours and 45 minutes long, and was conducted by 4 amazing researchers. In this post I will try to summarize the key lessons in those lectures and will give a brief overview of the field in interpretable machine learning and explainable artificial intelligence (XAI).
summary: Among this year’s tutorials at CVPR, Interpretable Machine Learning and Computer Vision was one of my favorite ones. The tutorial was about 2 hours and 45 minutes long, and was conducted by 4 amazing researchers.
title: Lessons From iMLCV Tutorial at CVPR 2020
